plain_english: > [!abstract]- 📋 Structural Index — The Counter-Move > > **Primary Operation:** Bridge — Physics ↔ Theology > **Domain:** Substrate-level physics, Atonement theology, Symmetry requirements > **Overall Verdict:** Every adversary move in Genesis 3 has an exact structural counter in the Cross and Re... My house settled. Not dramatically — no walls split, no floors buckled. Just a hairline crack in the foundation. A quarter-inch gap running through the concrete slab, barely visible unless you got on your hands and knees with a flashlight. The contractor who came out did not suggest repainting the walls. He did not recommend new carpet. He looked at the crack and said: "This is in the slab. Everything above this — the framing, the drywall, the fixtures — those are cosmetic. The problem is in the substrate. The fix has to go to the... In simpler terms, the article is trying to establish: If any row operates at a _different_ level — if the counter is shallower than the attack — the symmetry claim fails for that row, and the entire thesis weakens proportionally. **Prediction 2:** The Resurrection must be physical, or the framework collapses. The math layer has been extracted separately so equations can be translated and checked without blurring them into the prose.

contradictions.text: > [!abstract]- 📋 Structural Index — The Counter-Move > > **Primary Operation:** Bridge — Physics ↔ Theology > **Domain:** Substrate-level physics, Atonement theology, Symmetry requirements > **Overall Verdict:** Every adversary move in Genesis 3 has an exact structural counter in the Cross and Resurrection — not approximate, not thematic, exact > > **Axioms Established:** > - The fix must match the depth of the br...
This is why therapy helps but does not save.
The spirit may be restored, but the physical foundation is still cracked.

But Jesus is not operating from within the temporal frame. "Today" is a word that belongs to the eternal frame. [[04_THEOPYHISCS/___THE CONVERGENCE TX 6.6/GENESIS TO QUANTUM The Seven-Article Series/07_The Eraser and the Cross|Article 07]] showed that the Spirit actualizes without temporal constraint — the Cross reaches backward and forward because the Lamb was slain from the foundation of the world.

The framework's Grace term $G$ models exactly this: an unearned, full-power input from outside the system. ### What's suggestive but needs more work **The adversary's "moves" as a deliberate sequence.** We present the seven rows as if Satan executed a planned seven-step strategy.

But whether the adversary _intended_ each dimension of damage, or whether these are simply the consequences of a single substrate-level break, is a question the text does not resolve. **The structural symmetry as "exact."** We use the word "exact" in the FACTS card and throughout.
But "exact" implies a mathematical precision we have not formalized.

We acknowledge that someone could reasonably call it "precise but not exact." **The eternal-frame reading of "today."** The interpretation that _sēmeron_ operates from the eternal frame — that Jesus' "today" is not a temporal marker but an eternal-frame declaration — is the framework's reading.
Ours adds a physics layer that the text does not demand but does permit.
But it implies that the substrate of reality is _simple_ — a slab, a foundation, something a guy with a truck can assess.
But the reader should know: the slab is not a slab.
But the claim that this is the _complete_ set is implicit in the table format and not supported by the analysis.

math_items.expression: Jesus responds: "Truly I say to you, today (_sēmeron_) you will be with me in paradise" (Luke 23:43).
The word _sēmeron_ is doing extraordinary work.
_What we got right, what we're less sure about, and where we got carried away._
_The article above is what we believe. This audit is what we know we haven't proven yet. Both matter._

axiom_items.text: The Grace term $G$ in the Master Equation is not earned.

The delayed-choice quantum eraser is the laboratory shadow of this cosmic counter-move. > > **The Thief on the Cross ↔ Grace as Anti-Entropy (Scale Bridge)**: The thief's zero-credential, zero-time restoration is the extreme test case for the Grace term G in the Master Equation.

The adversary's move ([[Where Evil Comes From|NEW-A]]) and the divine counter-move are exact thermodynamic complements. --- **Series Navigation:** ← Prev: [[08_The Bible as Error-Correction Code|The Bible as Error-Correction Code]] · Next: TBD → --- > [!cite] Canonical Grounding > - [[012_E2.1_Master-Equation-First-Form|Master Equation (E2.1)]] — the Grace term G as the anti-entropic input that makes substrate-lev...

claims.text: If any row operates at a _different_ level — if the counter is shallower than the attack — the symmetry claim fails for that row, and the entire thesis weakens proportionally. **Prediction 2:** The Resurrection must be physical, or the framework collapses.
Paul stakes the entire Christian claim on a physical resurrection.
We meant that Christianity alone identifies a _historical event_ that broke the substrate, and that the fix must therefore be a historical event that repairs it.
The comparative claim is narrower than the sentence we wrote.
But the claim that this is the _complete_ set is implicit in the table format and not supported by the analysis.

Both matter._ --- > [!abstract]- FACTS > > | Dimension | Score | > |-----------|-------| > | Q0 Posture | 0.82 | > | Q1 Identity | 0.85 | > | Q2 Domain | 0.80 | > | Q3 Assertion | 0.88 | > | Q4 Evidence | 0.68 | > | Q5 Dependencies | 0.70 | > | Q6 Consequences | 0.82 | > | Q7 Falsification | 0.75 | > > **T-Score:** 0.74 | **CKG:** 7.3/10 | **Tier:** Provisional > **Type:** Bridge (Physics ↔ Theology) | **Confidenc...
2. **If the Resurrection is not physical.** This is the single most testable claim in the article.

If Jesus' body remained in the tomb — if the Resurrection is metaphor, vision, or spiritual ascent without bodily transformation — then Row 6 fails, the substrate remains unrepaired, and Paul's warning in 1 Corinthians 15:17 applies: faith is futile and sin remains uncovered. --- ## Framework Connections > [!abstract] Cross-Domain Bridges > > **Symmetry in Physics ↔ Symmetry in Atonement (Structural Isomorphism)**...

Every subsequent claim about how the error-correction protocol works ([[08_The Bible as Error-Correction Code|Article 08]]) must be compatible with the thief getting through with nothing but a single honest signal. > > **Entropy Activation ↔ Negentropy Injection (Thermodynamic Bridge)**: Row 3 connects to [[04_THEOPYHISCS/___THE CONVERGENCE TX 6.6/GENESIS TO QUANTUM The Seven-Article Series/04_The Day Time Began|A...
We do not claim to have captured God in equations.
We claim that when we look at His creation honestly — with the tools of physics and the revelation of Scripture — the same structure appears in both.

Attach evidence, axiom links, and falsification criteria to the strongest claims.
